item.title: The Best Nonfiction Book of the 21st Century
item.description: The epic oral history that reads like fiction, an A-Z guide to the language of romance, 2026 books in translation, and more.

item.title: Amidst Lawsuit, Utah Bans Its 23rd Book from All Public Schools
item.description: On Friday the 13, Utah banned a Stephen King book from every school district in the state. That was Utah's 23rd state-sanctioned ban.

item.title: A Must-Read National Book Award Finalist That Can Be a Quick Read
item.description: This finalist for the National Book Award in Poetry can be read in one day, but you'll want to linger over its brief, exquisite pages.

item.title: 6 of the Best New Book Releases Out February 17, 2026
item.description: There's a survivor's memoir, a retirment community-set mystery, a spooky middle grade surprise, and much more.

item.title: 7 New Aromantic Books Out in 2026
item.description: It's Aromantic Spectrum Awareness Week! Here are seven new books out in 2026 about people on the aromantic spectrum.
